query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "edit-compass & editreward-compass: a unified benchmark for image editi" computer science
rationale: This paper belongs in the literature review because it addresses the same domain (instruction-based image editing using LLMs/MLLMs) and measures the same core mechanism (controllability and flexibility of image editing via language models), satisfying criteria (a) and (b) as a canonical study on the specific technical approach the user is investigating.
